title: CriticVerdict
description: Output of the L6 Critic. Drives the merge/escalate/reject decision for a CompletedTask. The Critic's reasoning is posted to the PR verbatim so the trail is auditable.

decision.description: approve = auto-merge eligible. request_changes = back to L4 with specific notes. reject = abort task; L2 must re-plan. escalate_to_human = wait for CEO/lead sign-off; never auto-merge.

reasoning.description: The case for the decision. Cite specific evaluators, rubric clauses, and lessons_learned ids. No vague approvals.

rubric_version.description: Semver of /governance/rubric.md the critic applied. Reproducibility: a future audit can replay the same decision with the same rubric.

risk_tier_observed.description: Critic's independent assessment of risk. May differ from the cycle's declared risk_tier; if it does, the critic MUST escalate.

rubric_clauses_invoked.description: IDs of rubric clauses the critic relied on (e.g. R3.2, R7.1). Cross-checked against rubric.md.

evaluator_summary.description: Quick roll-up of evaluator verdicts for the audit trail.

follow_up_lessons.description: Draft lessons_learned entries the critic proposes. Not auto-inserted; require human approval.
